Metadata.title: Ruan Oliveira Sena | Web Developer & Designer
Metadata.description: Ruan Oliveira Sena’s portfolio — Gothd is a digital atelier crafting immersive web experiences, blending performance with artistry at the intersection of code and design.
Metadata.keywords: Ruan Oliveira Sena, Web Developer, Designer, Next.js, Freelancer, Portfolio, Full-stack

openGraph.description: Where code meets art — the portfolio of Ruan Oliveira Sena.

Features.title: Engineering
Features.subtitle: Robust technical solutions with a digital atelier finish.

performance.title: High Performance (SEO)
performance.description: Ultra-fast pages optimized for Google. Ensure your brand is found and loads instantly.

systems.title: Systems & Dashboards
systems.description: Centralize your company command. Manage inventory, clients, and vital data with security and integrity.

cms.title: Manageable Sites (CMS)
cms.description: Total autonomy. Edit texts and publish articles without touching code or depending on daily support.

design.title: UI/UX & Prototyping
design.description: Interfaces that guide the user. Design crafted with visual identity and enchanting micro-interactions.

project1.name: MR Law Firm
project1.description: Development of a comprehensive platform for a premium law firm, focused on semantic authority and lead conversion. The project integrates a scalable legal blog, service pages structured in SEO silos, and a dynamic Landing Page builder for paid traffic campaigns.

project2.name: Vortex System
project2.description: High-performance analytical dashboard for real-time data visualization.

project3.name: Silva Architecture
project3.description: Award-winning institutional site with immersive scroll animations and bold typography.

project4.name: Neon Bank
project4.description: Financial application focused on user experience and biometric security.

hero.title: Your Digital Presence with
hero.description: I build custom websites and applications that load in milliseconds and are focused on converting visitors into real customers.

speed.title: Extreme Speed
speed.desc: Google-optimized sites that load instantly on any connection.

management.title: Total Control
management.desc: Intuitive admin panel for you to update text and images without hassle.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.desc: No ready-made templates. A unique look that conveys your brand's authority.
